title: write_cxxrtl: assertion error at -O5
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

```
module \top
  wire width 1 $foo
  wire width 1 \bar
  connect \bar $foo
end
```

```yosys repro.il -p "write_cxxrtl -O5"```

## Expected behavior

CXXRTL code is emitted.

## Actual behavior

```
ERROR: Assert `is_lhs' failed in backends/cxxrtl/cxxrtl_backend.cc:905.
```
code_blocks:
module \top
  wire width 1 $foo
  wire width 1 \bar
  connect \bar $foo
end
